description: Intent-only request: classify fixed-label email categorization as workflow-anchored with a bounded LLM classifier.

conversation.text: Categorize each incoming email into one of: personal, work, newsletter, spam — and move it to that folder.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the LLM performs a bounded classification into a fixed set of labels, followed by a deterministic move action, with no open-ended reasoning.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
